children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: This chapter applies to all Federal law, and the implementation of that law, whether statutory or otherwise, and whether adopted before or after .November 16, 1993

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: Federal statutory law adopted after , is subject to this chapter unless such law explicitly excludes such application by reference to this chapter.November 16, 1993

children.heading: Religious belief unaffected
children.label: c Religious belief unaffected
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to authorize any government to burden any religious belief.
